data.html:
<html><head><meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark"></head><body><pre style="word-wrap: break-word; white-space: pre-wrap;">import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import {
  Menu, Search, Star, Settings, HelpCircle, X, Play, Pause,
  SkipBack, SkipForward, Volume2, VolumeX, Volume1, Maximize,
  Minimize, AlertCircle, Radio, ChevronLeft, Heart, Wifi, WifiOff
} from 'lucide-react';

interface Channel {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  logo: string;
  url: string;
  category: string;
}

const defaultChannels: Channel[] = [
  { id: 1, name: "R Plus News", logo: "https://rplus.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/RPLUS_NEWS.png", url: "https://thelegitpro.in/pntv/rplusnews24x7/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla News" },
  { id: 2, name: "Channel 24", logo: "https://yt3.googleusercontent.com/8Q8MCd6ypr2Hzbp60VE_stJPl063kQYfeTxdIQkAXRfhdzxByLl0sJYHsk43uTM4W_cOzwcbPQ=s160-c-k-c0x00ffffff-no-rj", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1703/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla News" },
  { id: 3, name: "Jamuna TV", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/logopedia/images/a/a0/Jamuna_Television.png", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1701/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla News" },
  { id: 4, name: "Independent TV", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/etv-gspn-bangla/images/b/bb/Independent_logo_2011.png", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1704/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla News" },
  { id: 5, name: "Somoy News", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/logopedia/images/8/8e/Somoy_Television.svg", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1702/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla News" },
  { id: 6, name: "ATN News", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/etv-gspn-bangla/images/4/4d/ATN_News_HD.png", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1706/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla News" },
  { id: 7, name: "DBC News", logo: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/subirkumarpaul/Logo/main/DBC%20News.png", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1728/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla News" },
  { id: 8, name: "Star News", logo: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/subirkumarpaul/Logo/refs/heads/main/Star%20News.jpg", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1710/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla News" },
  { id: 9, name: "Ekattor TV", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/logopedia/images/5/5d/Ekattor_TV_logo.png", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1705/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla News" },
  { id: 10, name: "News 24", logo: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/subirkumarpaul/Logo/main/News%2024.png", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1708/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla News" },
  { id: 11, name: "SATV", logo: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/subirkumarpaul/Logo/main/SATV.png", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1720/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla TV" },
  { id: 12, name: "Channel i", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/logopedia/images/9/9d/Channel_i_HD_logo_2021.png", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1723/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla TV" },
  { id: 13, name: "NTV HD", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/logopedia/images/e/e1/NTV_Bangla.svg", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1716/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla TV" },
  { id: 14, name: "ATN Bangla", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/logopedia/images/2/2e/ATN_Bangla.svg", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1722/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla TV" },
  { id: 15, name: "Maasranga TV", logo: "", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1711/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla TV" },
  { id: 16, name: "Bangla Vision", logo: "https://www.bvnews24.com/media/common/newbvlogo.png", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1715/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla TV" },
  { id: 17, name: "BTV HD", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/logopedia/images/1/12/BTV_HD_Logo.svg", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1709/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla TV" },
  { id: 18, name: "Channel 9", logo: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/subirkumarpaul/Logo/main/Channel%209.png", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1729/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla TV" },
  { id: 19, name: "BTV Sangsad", logo: "", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1713/output/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla TV" },
  { id: 20, name: "Desh TV", logo: "", url: "https://bozztv.com/rongo/rongo-DeshTV/tracks-v1a1/mono.m3u8", category: "Bangla TV" },
  { id: 21, name: "Deepto TV", logo: "", url: "https://byphdgllyk.gpcdn.net/hls/deeptotv/0_1/index.m3u8", category: "Bangla TV" },
  { id: 22, name: "TV9 Bangla", logo: "https://images.tv9bangla.com/wp-content/themes/tv9bangla/images/tv9-bangla-logo.svg", url: "https://dyjmyiv3bp2ez.cloudfront.net/pub-iotv9banaen8yq/liveabr/playlist.m3u8", category: "Indian" },
  { id: 23, name: "Zee 24 Ghanta", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/logopedia/images/b/bc/Zee_24_Ghanta_2025_Logo_2025.png", url: "https://d2dsoyvkr33m05.cloudfront.net/index_1.m3u8", category: "Indian" },
  { id: 24, name: "DD Bangla", logo: "", url: "https://d3qs3d2rkhfqrt.cloudfront.net/out/v1/7ff57cc9046b4c188b51a0d506f36e7f/index_3.m3u8", category: "Indian" },
  { id: 25, name: "Calcutta News", logo: "https://assets.calcuttatelevisionnetwork.in/cn.png", url: "https://akdnetwork.co.in/live/cnnew/index.m3u8", category: "Indian" },
  { id: 26, name: "Kolkata TV", logo: "https://a.jsrdn.com/hls/23215/kolkata-tv/logo_20250819_185012_70.png", url: "https://cdn.ottlive.co.in/kolkatatv/index.m3u8", category: "Indian" },
  { id: 27, name: "Republic Bangla", logo: "", url: "https://vg-republictvyupp.akamaized.net/ptnr-yuppt/v1/manifest/611d79b11b77e2f571934fd80ca1413453772ac7/vglive-sk-613605/93d674ab-f7a0-404e-88b2-b4f163373dbe/0.m3u8", category: "Indian" },
  { id: 28, name: "High News", logo: "", url: "http://highmedia.livebox.co.in:80/HIGHNEWShls/LIVE.m3u8", category: "Indian" },
  { id: 29, name: "ABP Ananda", logo: "", url: "https://amg01448-samsungin-abpananda-samsungin-ad-pw.amagi.tv/playlist/amg01448-samsungin-abpananda-samsungin/playlist.m3u8", category: "Indian" },
  { id: 30, name: "News18 Bangla", logo: "", url: "https://amg01448-samsungin-news18bangla-samsungin-ad-qy.amagi.tv/ts-eu-w1-n2/playlist/amg01448-samsungin-news18bangla-samsungin/playlist.m3u8", category: "Indian" },
  { id: 31, name: "T Sports", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/logopedia/images/7/79/T-Sports.png", url: "http://198.195.239.50:8095/tsports/tracks-v1a1/mono.m3u8", category: "Sports" },
  { id: 32, name: "DD Sports", logo: "", url: "https://d3qs3d2rkhfqrt.cloudfront.net/out/v1/b17adfe543354fdd8d189b110617cddd/index_3.m3u8", category: "Sports" },
  { id: 33, name: "CazeTV - WC 2026", logo: "", url: "https://dfr80qz435crc.cloudfront.net/MNOP/Amagi/Caze/Caze_TV_BR/Caze_TV.m3u8", category: "Sports" },
  { id: 34, name: "beIN Sports XTRA", logo: "", url: "https://bein-xtra-bein.amagi.tv/playlist.m3u8", category: "Sports" },
  { id: 35, name: "FIFA+ USA", logo: "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/9c/FIFA%2B_%282025%29.svg/960px-FIFA%2B_%282025%29.svg.png", url: "https://d2w9q46ikgrcwx.cloudfront.net/v1/master/3722c60a815c199d9c0ef36c5b73da68a62b09d1/cc-of5cbk3sav3w5/v1/sysdata_s_p_a_fifa_7/samsungheadend_us/latest/main/hls/playlist.m3u8", category: "Sports" },
  { id: 36, name: "FIFA+ English", logo: "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/9c/FIFA%2B_%282025%29.svg/960px-FIFA%2B_%282025%29.svg.png", url: "https://a62dad94.wurl.com/master/f36d25e7e52f1ba8d7e56eb859c636563214f541/UmFrdXRlblRWLWV1X0ZJRkFQbHVzRW5nbGlzaF9ITFM/playlist.m3u8", category: "Sports" },
  { id: 37, name: "Sangeet Bangla", logo: "https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/logopedia/images/d/da/Sangeet_Bangla_logo_2006.png", url: "https://cdn-4.pishow.tv/live/1143/master.m3u8", category: "Music" },
  { id: 38, name: "Orange Bangla TV", logo: "", url: "https://cdn-4.pishow.tv/live/1499/master.m3u8", category: "Music" },
  { id: 39, name: "ATN Music", logo: "", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1717/output/index.m3u8", category: "Music" },
  { id: 40, name: "Al Jazeera", logo: "", url: "https://owrcovcrpy.gpcdn.net/bpk-tv/1721/output/index.m3u8", category: "International" },
  { id: 41, name: "TBN 24 USA", logo: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/subirkumarpaul/Logo/main/TBN24.png", url: "http://cdn01.palki.tv/live/TBN24-M/index.m3u8", category: "International" },
  { id: 42, name: "Big Buck Bunny (Test)", logo: "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c5/Big_buck_bunny_poster_big.jpg/220px-Big_buck_bunny_poster_big.jpg", url: "https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8", category: "Test" },
  { id: 43, name: "Apple BipBop (Test)", logo: "", url: "https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/img_bipbop_adv_example_fmp4/master.m3u8", category: "Test" }
];

function App() {
  const [channels] = useState<Channel[]>(defaultChannels);
  const [filteredChannels, setFilteredChannels] = useState<Channel[]>(defaultChannels);
  const [currentChannel, setCurrentChannel] = useState<Channel | null>(null);
  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [activeCategory, setActiveCategory] = useState('All');
  const [favorites, setFavorites] = useState<number[]>(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('iptv_favorites');
    return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
  });
  const [volume, setVolume] = useState(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('iptv_volume');
    return saved ? parseFloat(saved) : 1;
  });
  const [muted, setMuted] = useState(false);
  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showControls, setShowControls] = useState(true);
  const [showOSD, setShowOSD] = useState(false);
  const [showVolumeOSD, setShowVolumeOSD] = useState(false);
  const [channelNumber, setChannelNumber] = useState('');
  const [showChannelNumber, setShowChannelNumber] = useState(false);
  const [settingsOpen, setSettingsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [helpOpen, setHelpOpen] = useState(false);
  const [showStats, setShowStats] = useState(false);
  const [clock, setClock] = useState('');
  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<{ id: number; message: string; type: 'error' | 'success' }[]>([]);
  const [isOnline, setIsOnline] = useState(navigator.onLine);
  const [touchStart, setTouchStart] = useState<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null);
  const [showFavorites, setShowFavorites] = useState(false);

  const videoRef = useRef<HTMLVideoElement>(null);
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const hlsRef = useRef<any>(null);
  const controlsTimeoutRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
  const osdTimeoutRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
  const volumeOsdTimeoutRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
  const channelNumberTimeoutRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
  const toastIdRef = useRef(0);
  const channelListRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const tapTimeoutRef = useRef<number | null>(null);

  const categories = ['All', 'Favorites', ...Array.from(new Set(channels.map(c => c.category)))];

  const showToast = useCallback((message: string, type: 'error' | 'success' = 'error') => {
    const id = ++toastIdRef.current;
    setToasts(prev => [...prev, { id, message, type }]);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setToasts(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
    }, 3000);
  }, []);

  const playChannel = useCallback((channel: Channel) => {
    if (!videoRef.current || !channel.url) return;

    setCurrentChannel(channel);
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    setShowOSD(true);

    localStorage.setItem('iptv_last_channel', String(channel.id));

    if (hlsRef.current) {
      hlsRef.current.destroy();
      hlsRef.current = null;
    }

    const video = videoRef.current;

    if (channel.url.includes('.m3u8')) {
      import('hls.js').then((Hls) => {
        if (Hls.default.isSupported()) {
          const hls = new Hls.default({
            enableWorker: true,
            lowLatencyMode: true,
          });
          hlsRef.current = hls;
          hls.loadSource(channel.url);
          hls.attachMedia(video);
          hls.on(Hls.default.Events.MANIFEST_PARSED, () => {
            video.play().catch(() => {});
          });
          hls.on(Hls.default.Events.ERROR, (_: any, data: any) => {
            if (data.fatal) {
              setError(`Failed to load stream: ${data.type}`);
              setIsLoading(false);
            }
          });
        } else if (video.canPlayType('application/vnd.apple.mpegurl')) {
          video.src = channel.url;
          video.play().catch(() => {});
        }
      });
    } else {
      video.src = channel.url;
      video.play().catch(() => {});
    }

    setTimeout(() => {
      if (osdTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(osdTimeoutRef.current);
      osdTimeoutRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => setShowOSD(false), 3000);
    }, 100);
  }, []);

  const toggleFavorite = useCallback((channelId: number, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    setFavorites(prev => {
      const updated = prev.includes(channelId)
        ? prev.filter(id => id !== channelId)
        : [...prev, channelId];
      localStorage.setItem('iptv_favorites', JSON.stringify(updated));
      return updated;
    });
  }, []);

  const handleVolumeChange = useCallback((newVolume: number) => {
    const clampedVolume = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, newVolume));
    setVolume(clampedVolume);
    if (videoRef.current) {
      videoRef.current.volume = clampedVolume;
    }
    localStorage.setItem('iptv_volume', String(clampedVolume));
    setShowVolumeOSD(true);
    if (volumeOsdTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(volumeOsdTimeoutRef.current);
    volumeOsdTimeoutRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => setShowVolumeOSD(false), 2000);
  }, []);

  const toggleMute = useCallback(() => {
    setMuted(prev => {
      const newMuted = !prev;
      if (videoRef.current) {
        videoRef.current.muted = newMuted;
      }
      return newMuted;
    });
  }, []);

  const togglePlayPause = useCallback(() => {
    if (!videoRef.current) return;
    if (videoRef.current.paused) {
      videoRef.current.play();
    } else {
      videoRef.current.pause();
    }
  }, []);

  const toggleFullscreen = useCallback(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return;
    if (document.fullscreenElement) {
      document.exitFullscreen();
    } else {
      containerRef.current.requestFullscreen();
    }
  }, []);

  const handleKeyPress = useCallback((digits: string) => {
    setChannelNumber(digits);
    setShowChannelNumber(true);

    if (channelNumberTimeoutRef.current) {
      clearTimeout(channelNumberTimeoutRef.current);
    }

    channelNumberTimeoutRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => {
      const num = parseInt(digits, 10);
      const channel = channels.find(c => c.id === num);
      if (channel) {
        playChannel(channel);
      }
      setChannelNumber('');
      setShowChannelNumber(false);
    }, 1500);
  }, [channels, playChannel]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const filtered = channels.filter(channel => {
      const matchesSearch = channel.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
      let matchesCategory = activeCategory === 'All';
      if (activeCategory === 'Favorites') {
        matchesCategory = favorites.includes(channel.id);
      } else {
        matchesCategory = activeCategory === 'All' || channel.category === activeCategory;
      }
      return matchesSearch && matchesCategory;
    });
    setFilteredChannels(filtered);
  }, [channels, searchQuery, activeCategory, favorites]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const video = videoRef.current;
    if (!video) return;

    const handlePlay = () => setIsPlaying(true);
    const handlePause = () => setIsPlaying(false);
    const handleCanPlay = () => setIsLoading(false);
    const handleWaiting = () => setIsLoading(true);
    const handlePlaying = () => setIsLoading(false);
    const handleError = () => {
      setError('Failed to play this channel');
      setIsLoading(false);
    };

    video.addEventListener('play', handlePlay);
    video.addEventListener('pause', handlePause);
    video.addEventListener('canplay', handleCanPlay);
    video.addEventListener('waiting', handleWaiting);
    video.addEventListener('playing', handlePlaying);
    video.addEventListener('error', handleError);

    return () => {
      video.removeEventListener('play', handlePlay);
      video.removeEventListener('pause', handlePause);
      video.removeEventListener('canplay', handleCanPlay);
      video.removeEventListener('waiting', handleWaiting);
      video.removeEventListener('playing', handlePlaying);
      video.removeEventListener('error', handleError);
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (videoRef.current) {
      videoRef.current.volume = volume;
      videoRef.current.muted = muted;
    }
  }, [volume, muted]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const updateClock = () => {
      const now = new Date();
      setClock(now.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }));
    };
    updateClock();
    const interval = setInterval(updateClock, 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (settingsOpen || helpOpen) {
        if (e.key === 'Escape') {
          setSettingsOpen(false);
          setHelpOpen(false);
        }
        return;
      }

      if (e.target instanceof HTMLInputElement) return;

      switch (e.key) {
        case ' ':
          e.preventDefault();
          togglePlayPause();
          break;
        case 'ArrowLeft':
          e.preventDefault();
          if (sidebarOpen) return;
          if (videoRef.current) videoRef.current.currentTime -= 10;
          break;
        case 'ArrowRight':
          e.preventDefault();
          if (sidebarOpen) return;
          if (videoRef.current) videoRef.current.currentTime += 10;
          break;
        case 'ArrowUp':
          e.preventDefault();
          if (!sidebarOpen) handleVolumeChange(volume + 0.1);
          break;
        case 'ArrowDown':
          e.preventDefault();
          if (!sidebarOpen) handleVolumeChange(volume - 0.1);
          break;
        case 'm':
        case 'M':
          toggleMute();
          break;
        case 'f':
        case 'F':
          toggleFullscreen();
          break;
        case 's':
        case 'S':
          setShowStats(prev => !prev);
          break;
        case 'c':
        case 'C':
          setSettingsOpen(true);
          break;
        case 'h':
        case 'H':
        case '?':
          setHelpOpen(true);
          break;
        case 'Escape':
          setSidebarOpen(false);
          break;
        case 'Backspace':
          setSidebarOpen(false);
          break;
        default:
          if (/^\d$/.test(e.key)) {
            handleKeyPress(channelNumber + e.key);
          }
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
  }, [togglePlayPause, handleVolumeChange, volume, toggleMute, toggleFullscreen,
      settingsOpen, helpOpen, sidebarOpen, channelNumber, handleKeyPress]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleMouseMove = () => {
      setShowControls(true);
      if (controlsTimeoutRef.current) {
        clearTimeout(controlsTimeoutRef.current);
      }
      controlsTimeoutRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => {
        if (isPlaying && !sidebarOpen) {
          setShowControls(false);
        }
      }, 3000);
    };

    window.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      if (controlsTimeoutRef.current) {
        clearTimeout(controlsTimeoutRef.current);
      }
    };
  }, [isPlaying, sidebarOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const lastChannelId = localStorage.getItem('iptv_last_channel');
    if (lastChannelId) {
      const channel = channels.find(c => c.id === parseInt(lastChannelId, 10));
      if (channel) {
        playChannel(channel);
      }
    }
  }, [channels, playChannel]);

  // Online/offline status
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleOnline = () => setIsOnline(true);
    const handleOffline = () => setIsOnline(false);
    window.addEventListener('online', handleOnline);
    window.addEventListener('offline', handleOffline);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('online', handleOnline);
      window.removeEventListener('offline', handleOffline);
    };
  }, []);

  // Touch gestures for mobile
  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current;
    if (!container) return;

    const handleTouchStart = (e: TouchEvent) => {
      if (e.touches.length === 1) {
        setTouchStart({ x: e.touches[0].clientX, y: e.touches[0].clientY });
      }
    };

    const handleTouchEnd = (e: TouchEvent) => {
      if (!touchStart) return;

      const touchEnd = {
        x: e.changedTouches[0].clientX,
        y: e.changedTouches[0].clientY
      };

      const deltaX = touchEnd.x - touchStart.x;
      const deltaY = touchEnd.y - touchStart.y;

      // Horizontal swipe
      if (Math.abs(deltaX) > 50 && Math.abs(deltaX) > Math.abs(deltaY)) {
        if (deltaX > 50) {
          // Swipe right - previous channel
          prevChannel();
        } else if (deltaX < -50) {
          // Swipe left - next channel
          nextChannel();
        }
      }

      // Vertical swipe for volume
      if (Math.abs(deltaY) > 50 && Math.abs(deltaY) > Math.abs(deltaX)) {
        if (deltaY < 0) {
          // Swipe up - volume up
          handleVolumeChange(volume + 0.1);
        } else {
          // Swipe down - volume down
          handleVolumeChange(volume - 0.1);
        }
      }

      // Double tap to toggle fullscreen
      const now = Date.now();
      if (tapTimeoutRef.current && now - tapTimeoutRef.current < 300) {
        toggleFullscreen();
        tapTimeoutRef.current = null;
      } else {
        tapTimeoutRef.current = now;
      }

      setTouchStart(null);
    };

    container.addEventListener('touchstart', handleTouchStart, { passive: true });
    container.addEventListener('touchend', handleTouchEnd, { passive: true });

    return () => {
      container.removeEventListener('touchstart', handleTouchStart);
      container.removeEventListener('touchend', handleTouchEnd);
    };
  }, [touchStart, volume, prevChannel, nextChannel, handleVolumeChange, toggleFullscreen]);

  const VolumeIcon = muted || volume === 0 ? VolumeX : volume < 0.5 ? Volume1 : Volume2;

  const prevChannel = useCallback(() => {
    if (!currentChannel) return;
    const idx = filteredChannels.findIndex(c => c.id === currentChannel.id);
    if (idx > 0) {
      playChannel(filteredChannels[idx - 1]);
    } else if (filteredChannels.length > 0) {
      playChannel(filteredChannels[filteredChannels.length - 1]);
    }
  }, [currentChannel, filteredChannels, playChannel]);

  const nextChannel = useCallback(() => {
    if (!currentChannel) return;
    const idx = filteredChannels.findIndex(c => c.id === currentChannel.id);
    if (idx < filteredChannels.length - 1) {
      playChannel(filteredChannels[idx + 1]);
    } else if (filteredChannels.length > 0) {
      playChannel(filteredChannels[0]);
    }
  }, [currentChannel, filteredChannels, playChannel]);

  const retryChannel = useCallback(() => {
    if (currentChannel) {
      playChannel(currentChannel);
    }
  }, [currentChannel, playChannel]);

  return (
    <div className="app">
      <div className="video-container" ref={containerRef}>
        <video
          ref={videoRef}
          className={`video-player ${!showControls ? 'hide-cursor' : ''}`}
          playsInline
        />

        {/* Loading Indicator */}
        <div className={`loading-indicator ${isLoading ? 'visible' : ''}`}>
          <div className="spinner" />
        </div>

        {/* Error Overlay */}
        <div className={`error-overlay ${error ? 'visible' : ''}`}>
          <AlertCircle className="error-icon" />
          <div className="error-message">{error}</div>
          <button className="error-retry" onClick={retryChannel}>
            Retry
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* OSD */}
        <div className={`osd ${showOSD && currentChannel ? 'visible' : ''}`}>
          {currentChannel?.logo && (
            <img src={currentChannel.logo} alt="" className="osd-logo" />
          )}
          <div className="osd-info">
            <div className="osd-name">{currentChannel?.name}</div>
            <div className="osd-category">{currentChannel?.category}</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Channel Number Overlay */}
        <div className={`channel-number-overlay ${showChannelNumber ? 'visible' : ''}`}>
          <div className="chnum-display">{channelNumber || '_'}</div>
          <div className="chnum-track">
            <div
              className="chnum-fill"
              style={{ width: `${(channelNumber.length / 4) * 100}%` }}
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Volume OSD */}
        <div className={`volume-osd ${showVolumeOSD ? 'visible' : ''}`}>
          <VolumeIcon className="volume-icon" />
          <div className="volume-track">
            <div className="volume-fill" style={{ height: `${volume * 100}%` }} />
          </div>
          <div className="volume-label">{Math.round(volume * 100)}%</div>
        </div>

        {/* Top Bar */}
        <div className={`top-bar ${showControls ? 'visible' : ''}`}>
          <div className="top-bar-left">
            <button className="menu-btn" onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)} aria-label="Toggle channels">
              {sidebarOpen ? <X /> : <Menu />}
            </button>
            <div className="app-title">StreamVault TV</div>
          </div>
          <div className="top-bar-right">
            <div className={`network-status ${isOnline ? 'online' : 'offline'}`}>
              {isOnline ? <Wifi style={{ width: 16, height: 16 }} /> : <WifiOff style={{ width: 16, height: 16 }} />}
            </div>
            <div className="clock">{clock}</div>
            <button className="menu-btn" onClick={() => setHelpOpen(true)} aria-label="Help">
              <HelpCircle />
            </button>
            <button className="menu-btn" onClick={() => setSettingsOpen(true)} aria-label="Settings">
              <Settings />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Bottom Controls */}
        <div className={`bottom-controls ${showControls ? 'visible' : ''}`}>
          <div className="controls-row">
            <button className="control-btn" onClick={prevChannel} title="Previous">
              <SkipBack />
            </button>
            <button className="control-btn play-btn" onClick={togglePlayPause} title="Play/Pause">
              {isPlaying ? <Pause /> : <Play />}
            </button>
            <button className="control-btn" onClick={nextChannel} title="Next">
              <SkipForward />
            </button>

            <div className="channel-info-controls">
              {currentChannel?.logo && (
                <img src={currentChannel.logo} alt="" className="controls-channel-logo" />
              )}
              <span className="controls-channel-name">{currentChannel?.name || 'No Channel'}</span>
            </div>

            <div className="controls-spacer" />

            <button
              className={`control-btn ${favorites.includes(currentChannel?.id || 0) ? 'active' : ''}`}
              onClick={(e) => currentChannel && toggleFavorite(currentChannel.id, e)}
              title="Favorite"
            >
              <Star fill={favorites.includes(currentChannel?.id || 0) ? 'currentColor' : 'none'} />
            </button>

            <button className="control-btn" onClick={toggleMute} title="Mute">
              <VolumeIcon />
            </button>

            <input
              type="range"
              className="volume-slider-mini"
              min="0"
              max="1"
              step="0.01"
              value={muted ? 0 : volume}
              onChange={(e) => handleVolumeChange(parseFloat(e.target.value))}
            />

            <button className="control-btn" onClick={toggleFullscreen} title="Fullscreen">
              <Maximize />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Stats Overlay */}
        <div className={`stats-overlay ${showStats ? 'visible' : ''}`}>
          <div className="stat-row">
            <span className="stat-label">Resolution:</span>
            <span>{videoRef.current?.videoWidth}x{videoRef.current?.videoHeight}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="stat-row">
            <span className="stat-label">Volume:</span>
            <span>{Math.round((muted ? 0 : volume) * 100)}%</span>
          </div>
          <div className="stat-row">
            <span className="stat-label">Channel:</span>
            <span>{currentChannel?.id || '-'}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Sidebar */}
      <div className={`sidebar ${sidebarOpen ? 'open' : ''}`}>
        <div className="sidebar-header">
          <Radio className="search-icon" style={{ width: 24, height: 24, color: 'var(--accent)' }} />
          <span className="sidebar-title">Channels</span>
          <span style={{ marginLeft: 'auto', color: 'var(--text-muted)', fontSize: '0.875rem' }}>
            {filteredChannels.length}
          </span>
        </div>

        <div className="sidebar-search">
          <div className="search-wrapper">
            <Search className="search-icon" />
            <input
              type="text"
              className="search-input"
              placeholder="Search channels..."
              value={searchQuery}
              onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="category-filters">
          {categories.map(cat => (
            <button
              key={cat}
              className={`category-chip ${activeCategory === cat ? 'active' : ''}`}
              onClick={() => setActiveCategory(cat)}
            >
              {cat}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        <div className="channel-list" ref={channelListRef}>
          {filteredChannels.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="empty-state">
              <Radio style={{ width: 48, height: 48, color: 'var(--text-muted)', marginBottom: 16 }} />
              <div className="empty-title">No channels found</div>
              <div className="empty-subtitle">
                {activeCategory === 'Favorites'
                  ? 'Add channels to favorites by tapping the star icon'
                  : 'Try a different search or category'}
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            filteredChannels.map(channel => (
              <div
                key={channel.id}
                className={`channel-item ${currentChannel?.id === channel.id ? 'active' : ''}`}
                onClick={() => playChannel(channel)}
              >
                <span className="channel-number">{channel.id}</span>
                {channel.logo ? (
                  <img
                    src={channel.logo}
                    alt=""
                    className="channel-logo"
                    loading="lazy"
                    onError={(e) => {
                      (e.target as HTMLImageElement).style.display = 'none';
                    }}
                  />
                ) : (
                  <div className="channel-logo" style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }}>
                    <Radio style={{ width: 20, height: 20, color: 'var(--text-muted)' }} />
                  </div>
                )}
                <div className="channel-info">
                  <div className="channel-name">{channel.name}</div>
                  <div className="channel-category">{channel.category}</div>
                </div>
                <button
                  className={`channel-fav ${favorites.includes(channel.id) ? 'favorited' : ''}`}
                  onClick={(e) => toggleFavorite(channel.id, e)}
                  aria-label={favorites.includes(channel.id) ? 'Remove from favorites' : 'Add to favorites'}
                >
                  <Star fill={favorites.includes(channel.id) ? 'currentColor' : 'none'} />
                </button>
              </div>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Sidebar Backdrop (mobile) */}
      {sidebarOpen && (
        <div
          style={{
            position: 'fixed',
            inset: 0,
            background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
            zIndex: 299,
            opacity: sidebarOpen ? 1 : 0,
            transition: 'opacity 0.3s'
          }}
          onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(false)}
        />
      )}

      {/* Settings Modal */}
      <div className={`modal-overlay ${settingsOpen ? 'visible' : ''}`} onClick={() => setSettingsOpen(false)}>
        <div className="modal" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
          <div className="modal-header">
            <span className="modal-title">Settings</span>
            <button className="modal-close" onClick={() => setSettingsOpen(false)}>
              <X />
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="modal-body">
            <div className="settings-group">
              <label className="settings-label">Volume Level</label>
              <div className="settings-row">
                <span className="settings-value">{Math.round(volume * 100)}%</span>
                <input
                  type="range"
                  className="settings-slider"
                  min="0"
                  max="1"
                  step="0.01"
                  value={volume}
                  onChange={(e) => handleVolumeChange(parseFloat(e.target.value))}
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="settings-group">
              <label className="settings-label">About</label>
              <div className="settings-row">
                <span className="settings-value">StreamVault TV Player v2.0</span>
                <span style={{ color: 'var(--accent)', fontSize: '0.875rem' }}>Modern Design</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Help Modal */}
      <div className={`modal-overlay ${helpOpen ? 'visible' : ''}`} onClick={() => setHelpOpen(false)}>
        <div className="modal" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
          <div className="modal-header">
            <span className="modal-title">Keyboard Shortcuts</span>
            <button className="modal-close" onClick={() => setHelpOpen(false)}>
              <X />
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="modal-body">
            <div className="help-grid">
              <div className="help-section">
                <h4>Playback</h4>
                <div className="help-item">
                  <span className="help-key">Space</span>
                  <span className="help-desc">Play / Pause</span>
                </div>
                <div className="help-item">
                  <span className="help-key">M</span>
                  <span className="help-desc">Toggle mute</span>
                </div>
                <div className="help-item">
                  <span className="help-key">F</span>
                  <span className="help-desc">Fullscreen</span>
                </div>
                <div className="help-item">
                  <span className="help-key">S</span>
                  <span className="help-desc">Statistics</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="help-section">
                <h4>Navigation</h4>
                <div className="help-item">
                  <span className="help-key">0-9</span>
                  <span className="help-desc">Channel number</span>
                </div>
                <div className="help-item">
                  <span className="help-key">Up/Down</span>
                  <span className="help-desc">Volume</span>
                </div>
                <div className="help-item">
                  <span className="help-key">Left/Right</span>
                  <span className="help-desc">Seek 10s</span>
                </div>
                <div className="help-item">
                  <span className="help-key">Esc</span>
                  <span className="help-desc">Close sidebar</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Toast Container */}
      <div className="toast-container">
        {toasts.map(toast => (
          <div key={toast.id} className={`toast ${toast.type}`}>
            {toast.message}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;
</pre></body></html>
